reviews.review_msg: He doesn't explain the instructions well. Doesn't provide feedback, and his class isn't well organized. If you want to learn about the subject avoid taking lessons with him
wort professor ever. He is not helpful and he doesnt give people chances. If he wants u to fail he will make you fail.
Not sure if you attended the same class. Made you work hard but fair in feedback and grade

Extremely unorganized and never emails you back even after reading them (or so he says). I have learned nothing over the course of this semester. Unable to justify his marking (letter grade). Should not be a professor. An embarrassment to SFU.

Doesn't teach. always finishes the class half-1 hour before 2 hours is up. doesn't reply to emails. doesn't show up on midterm and final exams. very irresponsible.  he also requires us to read an additional boring book...
